title: Pageviews — cookieless visitor analytics
description: Self-hosted, cookieless visitor analytics distilled from the models pilot. A public beacon (navigator.sendBeacon → /api/analytics, runtime=nodejs) resolves geo from the caller IP via offline geoip-lite, hashes the IP into a per-IP fixed-window rate-limit bucket key, then DISCARDS the raw IP; a bounded public `record` mutation validates + inserts into an isolated `pageviews` table (never a cookie, IP, or stable identity); a platform-admin `summary` query (requirePlatformAdmin FIRST) powers the Traffic dashboard (totals + unique sessions + top paths/referrers/countries/cities + per-day volume). SPA-aware: on the OS desktop the beacon counts each focused-window URL change as a page_view, gated off /admin, /kelola, /masuk, /api.

root layout (app-global): components/analytics-beacon.tsx AnalyticsBeacon ← mounted in app/layout.tsx inside <Suspense>
app/api/analytics/route.ts ← the beacon POST target (geo + IP hash + Convex ingest)
